mapper.insert: insert into project_application_log (application_id, action, operator_id, operator_name, reason, create_time) values (#{applicationId}, #{action}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{reason}, now())
mapper.select: select log_id, application_id, action, operator_id, operator_name, reason, create_time from project_application_log where application_id = #{applicationId} order by create_time desc, log_id desc
